title: Implement prompt list/show/render
description: Spec §21 item 10 / §11: prompts are loaded but there is no command to select and render them for an agent. Add a PromptRecord (zod), `prompt list`, `prompt show <id>`, and `prompt render --task <id> --agent <a> [--role <r>]` applying the selection precedence (global -> agent -> role -> scope -> task) and variable substitution ({{task_id}}, {{agent}}, {{scope}}, {{branch}}). Emit prompt.rendered when useful.
acceptance: PromptRecord zod schema per spec §6.4; validate covers prompts (schema).
`prompt render --task <id> --agent <a>` selects applicable prompts by applies_to and substitutes {{variables}}.
Selection precedence and variable substitution are unit-tested.
bun:test covers selection by agent/scope/task and one substitution.
notes: Finish-V1 phase. The prompt-waystation-v1 record's commands (start/during/finish) reference the messaging/brief commands that now exist.
